zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Roucy於大約1130年出生時，她的父親Hugh I de Roucy41歲，母親Richilde von Staufen35歲。她和Bouchard de Guise至少有1個女兒。她去世於1156年在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾享年27歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Roucy was born about 1130, her father, Hugh I de Roucy, was 41 and her mother, Richilde von Staufen, was 35. She had at least 1 daughter with Bouchard de Guise. She died in 1156, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Roucy est née environ 1130, son père, Hugh I de Roucy, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Richilde von Staufen, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Bouchard de Guise. Elle est décédée en 1156, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Roucy um 1130 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh I de Roucy 41 und ihre Mutter Richilde von Staufen 35. Sie hatte mit Bouchard de Guise mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1156 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Roucy è nata il circa 1130, sua padre, Hugh I de Roucy, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Richilde von Staufen, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Bouchard de Guise. Morì nel 1156, nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Roucyが約1130年に生まれた時，父Hugh I de Roucyは41歳，母Richilde von Staufenは35歳であった。彼女はBouchard de Guiseとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1156年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Roucy(이)가 대략 1130년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh I de Roucy(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richilde von Staufen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Bouchard de Guise(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-프로븐스 포캘키어에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Roucy nasceu aproximadamente 1130, seu pai, Hugh I de Roucy, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Richilde von Staufen, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Bouchard de Guise. Ela faleceu em 1156, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Roucy родилась около 1130 г., её отцу по имени Hugh I de Roucy было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Richilde von Staufen, 35. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Bouchard de Guise. Она умерла в 1156 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Roucy nació aproximadamente 1130, su papá, Hugh I de Roucy, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Richilde von Staufen, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Bouchard de Guise. Murió en 1156, en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 27 años.
